DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformBinding workspace used to scan only validated scripts.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Directory where the generated MetaDataQuality workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Include candidate ids in adjustment output. Implies --show-cases.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Show up to n candidate cases. Implies --show-cases.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDataQuality workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Promote one generated candidate. May be provided more than once.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaDataQuality workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
